findings.reviewer_angle: Cross-skill path-resolution semantics under transitive read
findings.finding: Task 4's verification gates are designed only to detect regressions in claim (a) — the explicit ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR}/.. walk in refine SKILL.md — and silently leave claim (b)'s transitive resolution undetected.

findings.reviewer_angle: Cross-skill path-resolution semantics under transitive read
findings.finding: R8b — the only post-merge gate intended to detect a claim (b) regression — is structurally unable to reliably exercise the second hop because events.log lacks lifecycle_start; the post-merge attestation can pass while testing only the SKIP path, leaving the transitive-resolution bug latent.
findings.evidence_quote: Manual runtime smoke (R8b, deferred): at the next genuine /cortex-core:refine invocation post-merge...

findings.finding: Task 6's verification gate scopes drift to plugins/cortex-core/skills/refine/, but the hook's Phase 4 diff is over the entire plugins/cortex-core/ tree (and plugins/cortex-overnight/). Unrelated drift elsewhere passes the plan's verification but blocks the hook.
findings.evidence_quote: git diff --quiet plugins/cortex-core/skills/refine/ exits 0 (no drift remaining post-commit) — pass if exit 0 (R9 acceptance).

findings.finding: Task 3 uses git add <dir> for mirror deletions while Task 2 uses explicit git rm for canonical deletions — asymmetric tooling for what should be a uniform staging contract.
findings.evidence_quote: Stage with explicit pathspec (plugins/cortex-core/skills/refine/), not git add -A.

findings.finding: End-user plugin-cache install is the dominant deployment target but neither pre-merge gates nor R8b's post-merge attestation will run there — R8b runs in the implementer's repo-development environment.
findings.evidence_quote: End-user plugin-cache install: refine ships under ~/.claude/plugins/cache/<marketplace>/cortex-core/<version>/skills/refine/...
findings.straddle_rationale: Adjacent gap because the plan's verification logic isn't internally inconsistent for the layout it targets — the issue is that an adjacent deployment target is never exercised.

findings.finding: ### 2b. Pre-Write Checks and ### 3a. Orchestrator Review are subsections of ## Protocol that refine's Step 5 adaptation list does not address. §3a is the load-bearing orchestrator-review hop the entire ticket pivots on, and it has no apply/skip/modify row.
findings.evidence_quote: Current line 177 reads: Read references/specify.md and follow its full protocol (§1–§4) with these adaptations:
findings.straddle_rationale: Tagged B because Task 1's R3+R4+R5 changes are themselves internally consistent at the row-existence level — the gap is in adjacent ###-level subsections.
